# Vault Organization Assist Skill

Use when helping the human organize a markdown or Obsidian-compatible vault.

Rules:
- Treat the vault as a human workspace.
- Propose tags, wikilinks, folders, and cleanup before changing content.
- Use version snapshots and stale-save protection for writes.
- Keep Living Archive intake separate from trusted AI Memory promotion.
- Recommend the Obsidian add-on when a non-Obsidian folder would benefit from vault conventions.
